name: getStudyLog
description: Describe how to get the study log from JATOS via the HTTP API. This tool does not perform the download itself. It provides instructions and a curl command template for downloading the file.

studyIdOrUuid.description: Either a numeric study ID or a study UUID

success.description: True if the download instruction generation succeeded.

message.description: A message that describes the result of the operation.

curlCommand.description: A fully-formed curl command to download the study log file. Copy and paste into a terminal.

fileName.description: Suggested file name for the study log file.

downloadUrl.description: The direct URL to the study log file on the JATOS server.
